Scenario & Steps: Confirm migrations applied (Neon) - run the verification query in the appendix
Expected Result: All enhancement columns/tables present

Scenario & Steps: Open the app URL; log in as Org Admin
Expected Result: Login page (teal/gold) loads; lands on the home hub

Scenario & Steps: Add a new user for each role; no password field is shown
Expected Result: System generates a temp password shown once with a Copy button

Scenario & Steps: Each tester logs in with their temp password
Expected Result: Forced to change password on first login; then reaches the hub

Scenario & Steps: Confirm landing shows 12 module tiles, gold logo, Open Dashboard
Expected Result: Tiles navigate to each module; sidebar logo returns to hub

Scenario & Steps: Create the chart of accounts; try a control account and a child under a parent
Expected Result: Accounts save; hierarchy shows; normal balance correct per class

Scenario & Steps: Lock an account, then try to edit/delete it
Expected Result: Locked account cannot be modified or deleted; clear message

Scenario & Steps: Create FY2026 and open periods Jan-Jun
Expected Result: 12 periods created; status OPEN; numbered 1-12

Scenario & Steps: Create tax codes VAT-STD 15%, EXEMPT, WHT-5; link VAT to acct 2110
Expected Result: Codes saved with correct treatment/rate

Scenario & Steps: Add exchange rates USD->GHS: 12.50 spot (Jan), 13.20 period-closing (Jun)
Expected Result: Rates saved; Latest rate shows newest

Scenario & Steps: Create cost centres (Admin, Sales) and a department
Expected Result: Saved; hierarchy/level respected

Scenario & Steps: Create customers Adom Ventures & Kantamanto Retailers
Expected Result: Customers saved with terms

Scenario & Steps: Create suppliers Volta Supplies & Tema Logistics
Expected Result: Suppliers saved

Scenario & Steps: Setup 2 locations, 3 items (AVCO, FIFO, Standard+PPV); link inventory & COGS accounts; PPV acct on INV-003
Expected Result: Items saved with correct costing method and GL links

Scenario & Steps: Statutory config FY2026 (PAYE bands, SSNIT 5.5%/13%, Tier 2 5%); salary components; 2 employees
Expected Result: Config + employees saved; bands editable

Scenario & Steps: Create asset categories with GL accounts (cost, accum deprn, deprn exp, gain/loss, retained earnings)
Expected Result: Categories saved with all account links

Scenario & Steps: Configure workflows: JOURNAL_ENTRY (2 levels), PAYMENT, BUDGET; add approvers; ANY_ONE/ALL_REQUIRED/MAJORITY
Expected Result: One active workflow per entity type; creating a second deactivates the first

Scenario & Steps: Post the opening capital journal (DR 1010 / CR 3010, GHS 200,000)
Expected Result: Posted; appears in GL & trial balance

Scenario & Steps: Create a balanced journal (DR Rent 6030 4,000 / CR Bank 1010 4,000); save draft
Expected Result: Saves; unbalanced entries are rejected

Scenario & Steps: Submit the journal for approval
Expected Result: Status -> PENDING_APPROVAL; approval request created; level-1 approvers notified

Scenario & Steps: Submitter tries to approve their own journal
Expected Result: Blocked - segregation of duties violation

Scenario & Steps: Approver approves through all levels; entry auto-advances and posts
Expected Result: Status -> APPROVED -> POSTED; ledger updated

Scenario & Steps: Reverse a posted journal (pick reverse date & period)
Expected Result: REVERSAL entry posts opposite DR/CR; original marked REVERSED

Scenario & Steps: Multi-currency journal using USD bank (1020) at rate 12.50
Expected Result: Base amounts computed; entry balances in base currency

Scenario & Steps: View the General Ledger for 1010 and drill to a transaction
Expected Result: Running balance correct; drill opens the source journal

Scenario & Steps: Raise invoice to Adom Ventures: 5,000 + VAT-STD 15%; post
Expected Result: DR Receivables 1110 5,750 / CR Sales 4010 5,000 / CR VAT 2110 750

Scenario & Steps: Record a partial receipt of 2,750 to Main Bank
Expected Result: DR Bank / CR Receivables; outstanding = 3,000; status PARTIALLY_PAID

Scenario & Steps: Issue a credit note against the invoice (500)
Expected Result: Receivable reduced; GL reflects reversal of revenue/VAT pro-rata

Scenario & Steps: Write off a small bad debt on an invoice
Expected Result: DR Bad Debt 6060 / CR Receivables; invoice settled

Scenario & Steps: Open the AR Ageing report
Expected Result: Buckets (current/30/60/90+) total to the receivables balance

Scenario & Steps: Enter supplier invoice from Volta Supplies: 3,000 + VAT; post
Expected Result: DR Expense/Inventory + VAT input / CR Payables 2010

Scenario & Steps: Pay the supplier from Main Bank (full or partial)
Expected Result: DR Payables / CR Bank; outstanding updates

Scenario & Steps: Record a supplier credit note
Expected Result: Payable reduced; GL correct

Scenario & Steps: Open the AP Ageing report
Expected Result: Buckets total to the payables balance

Scenario & Steps: Receipt 20 x INV-001 @ 250 (contra = Payables/Bank)
Expected Result: DR Inventory 1210 5,000 / CR contra; qty & avg cost update

Scenario & Steps: Receipt of INV-003 (Standard cost 40) at actual 44 with PPV account set
Expected Result: 3-line journal: DR Inventory at std, DR PPV 5015 variance, CR contra at actual

Scenario & Steps: Issue 5 x INV-001 (sale/consumption)
Expected Result: DR COGS 5010 / CR Inventory 1210 at the costing-method rate

Scenario & Steps: Create an ADJUSTMENT_OUT movement; a second user approves it
Expected Result: Requires approval; posts to GL on approval (four-eyes)

Scenario & Steps: Stocktake: create session, enter counts with variance, Post Variances selecting period and contra account
Expected Result: STOCKTAKE_IN/OUT movements posted to GL; cannot post without contra account

Scenario & Steps: NRV write-down on INV-002: enter NRV (4,200 < cost 4,800), write-down expense acct, period
Expected Result: DR NRV Write-down 5020 / CR Inventory; unit cost & value updated to NRV

Scenario & Steps: Export the Items list to CSV (with a search filter active)
Expected Result: CSV downloads the filtered items with all columns

Scenario & Steps: Open the Inventory Valuation report
Expected Result: Grand total equals the Inventory Control balance on the Balance Sheet

Scenario & Steps: Create VEH-001 (180,000, 60mo, reducing balance) & BLD-001 (500,000, 240mo, straight-line); auto-post acquisition
Expected Result: Assets saved; acquisition journal posts DR asset / CR bank-or-payable

Scenario & Steps: Open the Schedule tab on an asset; project 60 months
Expected Result: Read-only table of period charge/accum/carrying value; no journals posted

Scenario & Steps: Run depreciation for a period (Preview, then Post)
Expected Result: DR Deprn Expense 60xx / CR Accum Deprn; first period prorated by acquisition day

Scenario & Steps: Try to run depreciation again for the same period
Expected Result: Blocked - one run per period per asset

Scenario & Steps: Revalue BLD-001 upward (to 540,000) with a revaluation reserve account
Expected Result: DR Asset / CR Revaluation Reserve 3030; surplus tracked; later deprn transfers surplus to Retained Earnings

Scenario & Steps: Impair VEH-001: enter a recoverable amount below carrying value
Expected Result: UI shows computed loss (CV - recoverable); DR Impairment Loss 6050 / CR Asset

Scenario & Steps: Reverse part of the impairment (Impairment tab -> reversal section)
Expected Result: DR Asset / CR Impairment reversal; cannot exceed prior loss or no-impairment ceiling

Scenario & Steps: Dispose of an asset with proceeds to a proceeds account
Expected Result: DR proceeds + accum deprn / CR asset; gain or loss posts to gain/loss-on-disposal

Scenario & Steps: Import a bank statement for Main Bank (opening/closing + several lines)
Expected Result: Statement & lines saved; continuity validated

Scenario & Steps: Run Auto-Match, then manually match a remaining line to a ledger entry
Expected Result: Matched lines flagged; unmatched remain

Scenario & Steps: Create a journal from an unmatched line (bank charge to 6900)
Expected Result: Journal posts; line becomes matched

Scenario & Steps: Confirm & lock the reconciliation
Expected Result: Balances must agree (or override flagged); statement locked

Scenario & Steps: Unlock the reconciliation with a reason
Expected Result: Statement unlocked; action recorded in audit trail

Scenario & Steps: Give EMP-001 a loan (1,200, instalment 400)
Expected Result: Loan ACTIVE with balance

Scenario & Steps: Create a payroll run for a period; review the preview
Expected Result: PAYE per GRA bands; SSNIT 5.5% on basic; Tier 2; loan instalment deducted; net pay correct

Scenario & Steps: Submit -> Approve -> Pay (different people for each step)
Expected Result: Four-eyes enforced; on Pay, GL journal posts (salary exp / payables / net pay)

Scenario & Steps: Download the payment file (CSV) before locking
Expected Result: CSV with employee bank details & net pay

Scenario & Steps: Lock the run; then try to download the payment file again
Expected Result: Run -> LOCKED; payment file download blocked after locking

Scenario & Steps: Add a one-off bonus override; re-test bonus tax (5% on first 15% of basic)
Expected Result: Bonus tax computed per GRA; excess flows into PAYE

Scenario & Steps: Create FY2026 Operating Budget with description; add lines (Rent 6030 = 4,000/period)
Expected Result: Budget & lines saved

Scenario & Steps: Submit the budget for approval; ORG_ADMIN approves
Expected Result: isApproved = true; takes effect for variance

Scenario & Steps: Raise a commitment (purchase order) against an account
Expected Result: Commitment OPEN; reduces available budget

Scenario & Steps: Open the Variance Report; toggle byPeriod
Expected Result: Actuals scoped to FY2026; per-period rows when byPeriod on; over-threshold lines flagged

Scenario & Steps: Copy the budget to FY2027 with a 5% uplift
Expected Result: New budget with all lines x1.05

Scenario & Steps: Mark a cost centre as a reportable segment; open the Segment Report
Expected Result: Revenue/expense/result by segment (IFRS 8)

Scenario & Steps: Try to delete a tax code that is used on a posted line
Expected Result: Blocked with a clear message; deactivate instead

Scenario & Steps: Generate a VAT return for a period
Expected Result: Output/Input/Net boxes correct; WITHHOLDING excluded; overlap with a filed return blocked

Scenario & Steps: Move a VAT return DRAFT -> SUBMITTED -> FILED; try to delete a non-draft
Expected Result: Only DRAFT can be deleted

Scenario & Steps: Run FX Revaluation: pick Period, FX Gain/Loss acct (4900), period-end date (closing 13.20)
Expected Result: ADJUSTMENT journal posts the revaluation difference on USD balances (IAS 21)

Scenario & Steps: Reverse the FX revaluation (choose period & date)
Expected Result: Reversing journal posts; revaluation marked REVERSED

Scenario & Steps: Submit a journal into a 2-level workflow; approve level 1, then level 2
Expected Result: Advances level-by-level; completes only when final level satisfied

Scenario & Steps: Reject a request without a comment, then with a comment
Expected Result: Comment is required to reject; entity returns to DRAFT

Scenario & Steps: Test an ALL_REQUIRED level (both approvers) and a MAJORITY level
Expected Result: Level satisfied only when the rule is met

Scenario & Steps: Delegate a specific pending request to another user; that user approves
Expected Result: Delegatee can act on that request; workflow approver list not permanently changed

Scenario & Steps: Create a standing Delegation (date range) then revoke it
Expected Result: Delegate can approve within the window; revoke stops it

Scenario & Steps: As the original requester, Withdraw a pending request
Expected Result: Request -> WITHDRAWN; a journal returns to DRAFT for editing/resubmission

Scenario & Steps: Check the notification bell/inbox after each decision
Expected Result: Requester & approvers receive the right notifications; unread count updates

Scenario & Steps: Run the Trial Balance for the period
Expected Result: Total debits = total credits; isBalanced true

Scenario & Steps: From TB set filters, drill into an account, click breadcrumb back to TB
Expected Result: Filter state restored - no need to re-select before the next drill-down

Scenario & Steps: Generate the Balance Sheet (as-of date + comparative)
Expected Result: Current/Non-current split correct; isBalanced true (Assets = Liab + Equity)

Scenario & Steps: Generate the Income Statement (with YTD & % of revenue)
Expected Result: GP, EBITDA, EBIT, PBT, net profit compute; margins shown

Scenario & Steps: Generate the Cash Flow Statement
Expected Result: Operating/Investing/Financing total; closing cash reconciles to BS (reconciled true)

Scenario & Steps: Generate the Statement of Changes in Equity
Expected Result: All equity accounts appear (incl. unchanged Share Capital); closing equity reconciles to BS

Scenario & Steps: Try to close a period that still has an unposted journal
Expected Result: Blocked until all entries are posted

Scenario & Steps: Close a period, then reopen it (with reason), then lock it
Expected Result: Status transitions work; locked period rejects new postings

Scenario & Steps: Run Year-End Close for FY2026 (after all periods closed)
Expected Result: All periods LOCKED; recorded in audit trail

Scenario & Steps: Open the Audit Trail; filter by module, user, action, date
Expected Result: Every action from earlier phases is logged

Scenario & Steps: Open a log entry; check before/after state & IP
Expected Result: Detail shows previous/new values for updates

Scenario & Steps: Export the audit trail to CSV
Expected Result: CSV includes Previous Value / New Value columns

Scenario & Steps: A REPORT_VIEWER user tries to open the Audit Trail
Expected Result: Access denied (AUDITOR or ORG_ADMIN only)

Scenario & Steps: Change a user role; deactivate then reactivate a user; reset a password
Expected Result: Role change immediate; deactivated user cannot log in; reset shows a new generated password once

Scenario & Steps: Trigger 5 failed logins on a test account, then unlock it
Expected Result: Account locks after 5 attempts; admin Unlock restores access

Scenario & Steps: Open the Dashboard
Expected Result: 8 KPI cards populate; monthly Rev/Exp bar chart; Budget Alerts; Pending Approvals shows YOUR count; recent journals

Scenario & Steps: Trial Balance
Expected Result: Total debits = total credits

Expected Result: Total Assets = Total Liabilities + Equity

Expected Result: Valuation report total = Inventory Control (1210) balance

Expected Result: AR ageing total = 1110; AP ageing total = 2010

Expected Result: Sum of carrying values = (cost accts - accum deprn accts)

Expected Result: CFS closing cash = Balance Sheet cash & bank
